description: Example dependency graph for agent orchestrator. Agents within a wave run in parallel; waves execute serially.

waves.label: Foundation
waves.notes: No dependencies. These agents must complete before wave 1.

waves.label: Core Processing
waves.notes: All depend on wave 0. Run in parallel within this wave.

waves.label: Post-Processing
waves.notes: Reads all updated files from waves 0-1.
